name: > Alone In Your Room.
description:
╮（﹀_﹀）╭

Thinking to yourself.

-

After a long day of doing whatever, you find yourself lying down in your bed with your thoughts. Just you, the plush mattress holding your weight up, the sensation of the covers underneath your fingertips, and warm dim lighting casting shadows. A comforting state you’re in.

Although, nature is calling. (Requested!)

-

TAGS:

Fluff, (optional) Diapers, Alone, Scenario, (possible) Wetting/Waterworks.
